features: Old Spice Night Panther rich fragrance with Dark Chocolate, Vanilla Scent & Spicy Citrus Notes makes you unforgettable, you'll basically be the center of the universe
Say goodbye to odours for 48 hours
Acts like a protective shield against white marks and yellow stains
description: Product Description Dare we say, this is one sniffworthy scent. Night Panther exudes an invigorating fragrance that is sure to attract the attention of beautiful partners. One only sees the Night Panther at night because he works days. Old Spice Night Panther deodorant Stick strengthens your masculine power as it smells so good you'll feel confident in any situation. Get rid of body odour once and for all and become a modern King of the Jungle. Ingredients Dipropylene Glycol, Aqua, Propylene Glycol, Sodium Stearate, Poloxamine 1307, PPG-3 Myristyl Ether, Parfum, Tetrasodium EDTA, Limonene, Linalool, Hexyl Cinnamal, Benzyl Alcohol, Geraniol, Coumarin, Citronellol, Citral, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-Di-T-Butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, CI 42090 Directions Clean and dry the bottoms, apply a thin and even layer of deodorant, wait until the deodorant is completely dry, apply all day or after physical activity when needed. Safety Warning KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. If rash develops discontinue use. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
